label: Strategy Classification
definition: Classification of an entity's strategic approach or market positioning

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking assessment of an entity's or technology's long-term viability

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Documented outcome that occurred after the study's observation period

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's capabilities or maturity level

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative or comparative measurement from research or field data

label: Framework Factor
definition: Structural factor or dynamic identified in the study's analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistics or industry-level data points

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative judgment or prediction from an identified expert or authority

label: High
definition: Strong evidence from multiple sources, direct measurement, or well-established facts

label: Medium
definition: Reasonable evidence from limited sources, indirect measurement, or informed estimates

label: Low
definition: Weak evidence, speculative, or based on limited anecdotal information

label: Verified
definition: Outcome has been confirmed by subsequent events or independent verification

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic examination of industry structure and competitive dynamics

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing vendors or products

label: Benchmarking
definition: Quantitative comparison against reference metrics or peer performance

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection through interviews, surveys, or site visits

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and published materials

label: Statistical Analysis
definition: Application of statistical methods to quantitative data

label: High
definition: Study has significant historical or analytical value

label: Medium
definition: Study has moderate historical or analytical value

label: Low
definition: Study has limited historical or analytical value

label: Not Applicable
definition: Importance assessment is not applicable

label: High
definition: Study findings remain highly relevant to current conditions

label: Medium
definition: Study findings have moderate relevance to current conditions

label: Low
definition: Study findings have limited relevance to current conditions

label: Not Applicable
definition: Relevance assessment is not applicable

label: High
definition: Study predictions proved highly accurate over time

label: Medium
definition: Study predictions proved moderately accurate over time

label: Low
definition: Study predictions proved largely inaccurate over time

label: Not Applicable
definition: Prescience assessment is not applicable

label: Expert Report
definition: Expert witness report or testimony prepared for litigation

label: Vendor
definition: Company that sells software or technology products

label: End User
definition: Organization that purchases and uses technology products

label: Analyst
definition: Research and advisory firm

label: Standards Body
definition: Industry consortium or organization developing technical standards

label: Enterprise Suite
definition: Integrated multi-module enterprise application platform

label: Point Solution
definition: Standalone application addressing a single functional domain

label: Integration Technology
definition: Technology or methodology for connecting disparate applications

label: Development Paradigm
definition: Software development methodology or architectural approach

label: Active
definition: Entity is currently operating

label: Acquired
definition: Entity has been acquired by another organization

label: Dissolved
definition: Entity has ceased to exist

label: Diminished
definition: Entity still exists but is dramatically reduced in scope or relevance
